calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Jeffrey Fletterick, Esq. for the Plaintiff Investment Retrievers, Inc. a California Corp.
Plaintiff's Witness Rebecca Choi was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by defendant Joe Mathew aka Joseph Mathew; and tresa Mathew aka Thresiamma Mathew aka Tresa Matther.
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages/Principal - $67,366.84
Prejudgment Interest - $63,316.89
Attorney's Fees - waived
Costs - $510.00
Total $131,193.73
Judgment was submitted and signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2012 Continued To Jan-23-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
